AI Operating System
Application Received

Your application is under review.

We've received everything we need. You'll hear from us within 48 hours with our decision and, if accepted, your next steps.

1
Check your inbox

A confirmation email is on its way to the address you provided. Check your spam folder if it doesn't arrive within a few minutes.

2
Decision within 48 hours

We review every application personally. You'll receive a clear yes or no — and if no, a brief explanation of why and what we'd suggest instead.

3
If accepted — invoice and booking link

You'll receive an invoice for the $500 Blueprint Session fee and a booking link to schedule your session at a time that works for you. Sessions are typically held via Zoom.

While you wait

You may want to start thinking about the processes in your business that consume the most of your time. The more specific you can be about these when we connect, the more actionable your Blueprint will be.
